accessanalyzer.analyzer.filter.CfnAbout:
The criteria that defines the rule.

To learn about filter keys that you can use to create an archive rule, see [AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer filter keys](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/access-analyzer-reference-filter-keys.html) in the *AWS Identity and Access Management User Guide*.

accessanalyzer.analyzer.filter.Contains.Description: A "contains" condition to match for the rule.

accessanalyzer.analyzer.filter.Eq.Description: An "equals" condition to match for the rule.

accessanalyzer.analyzer.filter.Exists.Description: An "exists" condition to match for the rule.

accessanalyzer.analyzer.filter.Neq.Description: A "not equal" condition to match for the rule.

accessanalyzer.analyzer.filter.Property.Description: The property used to define the criteria in the filter for the rule.
